category_sources: source_facts.description says wrapper for auto-detecting build and test commands; official docs say mk eases contribution by exposing common repository actions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mk; official docs title is Documentation of mk tool and command examples use mk.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs site; official docs include home and supported-tools pages.
repo_sources: Official mk documentation links to GitHub; the linked official repository is pycontribs/mk.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe detecting repository build/test tools and exposing common commands.
